verses.1: A false balance is an abomination to the LORD, But a just weight is His delight.
verses.2: When pride comes, then comes dishonor; But with the humble there is wisdom.
verses.3: The integrity of the upright will guide them, But the perversity of the treacherous will destroy them.
verses.4: Riches do not benefit on the day of wrath, But righteousness rescues from death.
verses.5: The righteousness of the blameless will smooth his way, But the wicked will fall by his own wickedness.
verses.6: The righteousness of the upright will rescue them, But the treacherous will be caught by their own greed.
verses.7: When a wicked person dies, his expectation will perish, And the hope of strong people perishes.
verses.8: The righteous is rescued from trouble, But the wicked takes his place.
verses.9: With his mouth the godless person destroys his neighbor, But through knowledge the righteous will be rescued.
verses.10: When things go well for the righteous, the city rejoices, And when the wicked perish, there is joyful shouting.
verses.11: By the blessing of the upright a city is exalted, But by the mouth of the wicked, it is torn down.
verses.12: One who despises his neighbor lacks sense, But a person of understanding keeps silent.
verses.13: One who goes about as a slanderer reveals secrets, But one who is trustworthy conceals a matter.
verses.14: Where there is no guidance the people fall, But in an abundance of counselors there is victory.
verses.15: One who is a guarantor for a stranger will certainly suffer for it, But one who hates being a guarantor is secure.
verses.16: A gracious woman attains honor, And ruthless men attain riches.
verses.17: A merciful person does himself good, But the cruel person does himself harm.
verses.18: A wicked person earns deceptive wages, But one who sows righteousness gets a true reward.
verses.19: One who is steadfast in righteousness attains life, But one who pursues evil attains his own death.
verses.20: The perverse in heart are an abomination to the LORD, But the blameless in their walk are His delight.
verses.21: Be assured, the evil person will not go unpunished, But the descendants of the righteous will be rescued.
verses.22: As a ring of gold in a pig’s snout So is a beautiful woman who lacks discretion.
verses.23: The desire of the righteous is only good, But the expectation of the wicked is wrath.
verses.24: There is one who scatters, and yet increases all the more, And there is one who withholds what is justly due, and yet it results only in poverty.
verses.25: A generous person will be prosperous, And one who gives others plenty of water will himself be given plenty.
verses.26: One who withholds grain, the people will curse him, But blessing will be on the head of him who sells it.
verses.27: One who diligently seeks good seeks favor, But one who seeks evil, evil will come to him.
verses.28: One who trusts in his riches will fall, But the righteous will flourish like the green leaf.
verses.29: One who troubles his own house will inherit wind, And the foolish will be servant to the wise-hearted.
verses.30: The fruit of the righteous is a tree of life, And one who is wise gains souls.
verses.31: If the righteous will be repaid on the earth, How much more the wicked and the sinner!
